exploration_notes: The AQL query pipeline flows through these stages: (1) **Parsing** — `arangod/Aql/Parser.cpp` defines class `Parser` which parses AQL query text into an AST. (2) **Optimization** — `arangod/Aql/Optimizer.cpp` defines class `Optimizer` which transforms the AST into an optimized execution plan by applying optimizer rules. (3) **Execution** — `arangod/Aql/ExecutionEngine.cpp` defines class `ExecutionEngine` which orchestrates query plan execution, and `arangod/Aql/ExecutionBlock.cpp` defines class
